sys_script_client.description:
2.8.0 | 2022-08-11 |raj | DFCT0011152 - Reviewer comments does NOT display when user "Approve and Sign" or "Concur and sign" a task/template task 2.8.0 | 2022-08-10 | raj | DFCT0011152 - Reviewer comments does NOT display when user "Approve and Sign" or "Concur and sign" a Task & Template task 2.8.0 | 2022-07-27 |raj | DFCT0010951 - "Response and Reviewer Decision" section header should NOT display on the Quick Task form 2.8.0 | 2022-05-11 |raj | STRY0116490 - Tasker Types update wording - Approval and Concur types
2.5.3 STRY0086943 - RESPONSE/REVIEWER - Response & Reviewer Section Displays/Hidden on Approval and Concur Task Types in Completed, Closed, Incomplete and Cancel states
Remove form fields and sections when tasker type = "Information Only" OR "Acknowledgement"
sys_script_client.name: Task - ITTACK onLoadonChange hide fields
